heading: Conflict of interest; personnel and activities covered
label: 3509 Conflict of interest; personnel and activities covered
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in par. (3), was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 96–5393 Stat. 371Aug. 14, 1979

children.text: using their office or position for private gain;
giving preferential treatment to any person;
making recommendations or decisions relating to any activity authorized by this chapter in other than an impartial and independent manner;
misusing Government property or official information obtained through their office or position which has not been made available to the general public; or
affecting adversely the confidence of the public in the integrity of the Institute.
